message:
feat(supervision): add unified signature database and comprehensive tests

- Add signature.rs: unified SupervisorSignature combining all detection patterns
  (process names, env vars, sockets, PID files, parent patterns)
- Add SignatureSchema with versioning (SCHEMA_VERSION=1) and metadata
- Add SignatureDatabase with 20+ built-in supervisor signatures
- Support TOML/JSON file loading and directory scanning for custom signatures
- Add export methods to legacy databases (supervisor, environ, IPC)

- Add supervision_tests.rs: 39 comprehensive tests for supervisor detection
  - Parent chain reconstruction and stat parsing
  - Pattern matching for all supervisor categories (agents, IDEs, CI, terminals)
  - Combined detection integration tests
  - Edge cases (circular refs, zombies, kernel threads)
  - Logging/serialization structure tests

- Make parse_stat pub(crate) for test access

All 105 supervision module tests pass.

Closes: process_triage-0pu, process_triage-cfia

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
